PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 04, 2002, is admitted to probate. Adam Zion is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $34,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 16, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
